ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Continued To Jan-12-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Troon, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR #6812. Telephone: 415-551-0625. Email: amendoza@sftc.org.

Kelly Bresso, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Compensation Insurance Fund, a Public Enterprise Fund and Independent Agency of the State of California.
Tammy Vancourt, Collection Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Vancourt appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Troon, Inc.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Open Book Account and Declaratory Relief was filed on October 22, 2018, and personally served on defendant Troon, Inc.,'s Registered Agent on November 1, 2018.
Default as to defendant Troon, Inc. was entered on December 10, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 28, 2020.

Plaintiff State Compensation Insurance Fund submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: One page document entitled 2016 Audit - Period 6/23/16-6/23/17.............ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Two page document entitled Billing and Collections - Display Bill..........ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff State Compensation Insurance Fund, a Public Enterprise Fund and Independent Agency of the State of California, and against the defaulted defendant Troon, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,245,565.72.
Costs - $1,263.38.

Total - $2,246,829.10.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
